_meta.note: trw2-crypto-sat-mid (14:00 UK): sig-089 BTCUSDT LONG added -- BTC weekend guarantee slot, scored standalone confidence 80 (no degradation ladder needed). Entered on its own merit: H1 sweep 62537.56 + confirmed CHoCH 64387.99, pending pullback entry at M5 Order Block Detector zone 63673.63-63840.80 with Liquidity Swings confluence. ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT/XRPUSDT/DOGEUSDT scanned, all withheld (high CHOP, flat ranges, no structure) -- correctly no forced setups per the crypto-watchlist-without-a-floor rule (ROUTINES_V2 SS9). No prior active setups entering this run (active_setups.json was empty after the 2026-07-18 retroactive sig-088 expiry cleanup).

scenario_schema.sl_update_direction_rule: reduce_risk_only: LONG -> new_sl > current_sl AND new_sl < entry_lower; SHORT -> new_sl < current_sl AND new_sl > entry_upper
scenario_schema.screenshot_m15_path_doc: Path to the §7b M15 standard screenshot. Must be <id>_m15_standard_<ts>.png with companion _meta.json (TF=15, has_entry_box, has_sl_line, has_tp_lines). Written by bar-walk after capture_screenshot. H1 or non-standard screenshots must NOT be stored here -- use null until §7b is run.

flags_doc.applied: set true once trigger fires -- prevents re-application
flags_doc.one_shot: always true -- each scenario fires at most once
flags_doc.disabled: set true by mutually_exclusive_with when a sibling fires
flags_doc.mutually_exclusive_with: list of scenario keys to disable when this one fires

scenario_schema.precondition_doc: optional -- a bar matching precondition type/level must appear BEFORE the main trigger bar (chronological order)

active_setups.expiry_note: crypto weekend expiry per §9a -- Monday 22:00 UK daily-close anchor
active_setups.notes: Pending limit entry -- price at publication 64032, above entry_upper. M5 BOS/CHoCH M15/engulfing trigger required on actual fill before treating as triggered/active. H1 sweep 62537.56 -> CHoCH 64387.99 confirmed, RSI H1 56.5 no bearish divergence, CHOP H1 47.

a.label: Zone reclaim confirmation -- price sweeps slightly below OB low then closes back above OB high on M15, confirming bullish reaction

precondition.note: precondition: a bar dips below entry_lower before the reclaim close

b.label: observational -- price continues sideways/up without a clean OB retest

c.label: structure weakening -- M15 close inside the lower half of the OB without reclaim, flag for manual review before SL

flags.action_note: BTCUSDT sig-089: M15 closed below 63630 inside the OB without a reclaim -- structure weakening, monitor closely for SL 63570.
